typeName.description: Name of data type of the object to create

key.description: Field to set for the object to create

value.description: Value to set for the object to create

key.description: Field to set for the object to create

value.description: Value to set for the object to create

objectId.description: ID of the object to update

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

key.description: Field to set for the object to create

equals.description: Use to test strict equality, for all field types

not equal.description: Use to test strict equality, for all field types

is_empty.description: Use to test whether a thing's given field is empty, for all field types

is_not_empty.description: Use to test whether a thing's given field is not empty, for all field types

text contains.description: Use to test if a text field contains a string, for text fields only

not text contains.description: Use to test if a text field does not contain a string, for text fields only

greater than.description: Use to compare a thing's field value relative to a string or number, for text, number, and date fields

less than.description: Use to compare a thing's field value relative to a string or number, for text, number, and date fields

in.description: Use to test whether a thing's field is in a list, for all field types

not in.description: Use to test whether a thing's field is not in a list, for all field types

contains.description: Use to test whether a list field contains an entry, for list fields only

not contains.description: Use to test whether a list field does not contains an entry, for list fields only

empty.description: Use to test whether a list field is empty, for list fields only

not empty.description: Use to test whether a list field is not empty, for list fields only

geographic_search.description: Use to test if the current thing is within a radius from a central address. To use this, the value sent with the constraint must have an address and a range. See link.

geographic_search.description: Use to test if the current thing is within a radius from a central address. To use this, the value sent with the constraint must have an address and a range. See link.

value.description: Value to set for the object to create

filtersJson.description: Refine the list that is returned by the Data API with search constraints, exactly as you define a search in Bubble. See link.

sort_field.description: Specify the field to use for sorting. Either use a fielddefined for the current typeor use _random_sorting to get the entries in a random order.

geo_reference.description: When the field's type is geographic address, you need to add another parameter geo_reference and provide an address as a string
